summary: Iteration 7: iyzico sandbox entegrasyon testi + tüm core API testleri. 15/15 backend test geçti. Frontend ana sayfa, ödeme başarılı/başarısız sayfaları çalışıyor. iyzico initialize sandbox URL'i doğrulandı (sandbox-cpp.iyzipay.com).

integration_issues.issue: Console 401/404 errors on /odeme-sonuc page (order fetch fails for test orderId='test12345678' - expected behavior for non-existent order)

critical_code_review_comments: payments.py line 126: callbackUrl uses FRONTEND_URL + '/api/payments/iyzico/callback' — this is correct for the K8s ingress routing (frontend URL → /api prefix routes to backend)
iyzico IYZICO_BASE_URL env var default is 'https://sandbox-api.iyzipay.com' in code but note says 'sandbox-api.iyzipay.com' without https — ensure .env value has https:// prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: iyzico sandbox integration tested and working. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend pages: homepage products visible, /odeme checkout shows iyzico button, /odeme-sonuc?status=success shows 'Ödeme Başarılı!', /odeme-sonuc?status=failed shows 'Ödeme Başarısız'. IYZICO_BASE_URL should have https:// prefix in env. Iteration 6 had 22/22 passing tests, iteration 7 adds 15 new tests focused on iyzico.
